meta.title: #BeADeepLearner like Kulsoom Abdullah with DeepLearning.AI
meta.description:
"Enrolling in and completing the Deep Learning Specialization stoked my curiosity about many theoretical concepts. It also gave me the confidence to take on more hands-on deep learning projects and dive deeper into advanced machine learning methods. Since then, I’ve completed many projects, including my most recent one, which was about a chest x-ray multi-label multi-classification. So if you’re looking to be a deep learner, this is a great place to start."

Looking to grow your skills and build a career in AI? Join 1 million+ learners and #BeADeepLearner with the Deep Learning Specialization, a foundational online program by machine learning pioneer Andrew Ng. Read how learners like Kulsoom and others took the next step in their AI journey: https://www.deeplearning.ai/program/deep-learning-specialization/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=dls-jan21&course_id=dls-2
